title: Twilight · Lesson 1
description: 真人原声跟读测试课程

sentences.english: I'd never given much thought to how I would die.
sentences.chinese: 我从没多想过自己会怎样死去。
sentences.shadowing: I'd NEVER given much THOUGHT‿to HOW‿I would DIE. ↘

sentences.english: But dying in the place of someone I love seems like a good way to go.
sentences.chinese: 但为心爱的人而死，似乎是个不错的方式。
sentences.shadowing: But DYING‿in the PLACE‿of someone I LOVE / seems like‿a GOOD way‿to GO. ↘
